name: Taos Artist's B&B
demoNotice: Demo draft, not an official website.
headline: Stay Where the Artists Inspire and Create.
description: Taos Artist's B&B is a vibrant restored adobe hacienda featuring original artwork from local Taos artists, a lush garden courtyard, and a location on the historic Kit Carson Road. Breakfast is an event in itself, featuring New Mexican specialties daily.

features.title: Rotating Art Exhibitions
features.description: Gallery-quality local art throughout all rooms and common areas.

features.title: Lush Garden Courtyard
features.description: Secluded native plant garden with fountain and seating.

features.title: Artist Workshop Space
features.description: On-site studio available for guest workshops.

amenities.title: New Mexican Breakfast
amenities.body: Made-from-scratch breakfast with local green chili

amenities.title: Art For Sale
amenities.body: Purchase pieces directly from the walls

contact.address: 1258 Paseo Del Pueblo Sur, Taos, NM 87571
